description_long: This is a rustic wooden vanity cabinet with a rectangular base and an attached arched mirror. The cabinet features two horizontal drawers on the front, each with a round black knob for easy access. The wood grain is clearly visible, giving the piece a natural and slightly weathered appearance. The mirror is set in a thick wooden frame that matches the base, and the back of the mirror is solid wood. The sides and back of the cabinet are plain, with the wood texture continuing throughout. This piece is suitable for use in urban settings such as bedrooms, dressing rooms, or boutique shops.
description: A rustic wooden vanity cabinet with two drawers and an arched mirror, featuring visible wood grain and black knobs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the mirror frame and the depth of the cabinet base.
description_view_1: Front view displaying two drawers with black knobs and the arched mirror above.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, highlighting the cabinet's depth and mirror support.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the solid wooden back of the mirror and the plain back panel of the cabinet.
